positive: A stylized, minimalist forest scene featuring a central group of abstract woodland animals (fox, deer, raven, bear) depicted with clean, confident silhouettes. The style should be inspired by mid-century modern illustration and woodblock print aesthetics, utilizing a highly limited, complementary color palette of deep teal, burnt orange, and cream. The composition must be centered and highly scalable for apparel printing. The background should be simple negative space with subtle texture gradients to give depth, emphasizing the clean edges and strong contrast of the subjects. Use bold linework and flat planes of color. Overhead lighting with soft, directional shadows to enhance silhouette impact. Vector art quality, high contrast, clean composition.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, dirty, messy, copyright, logo, celebrity, cartoon, photorealism, gradients (unless intentional)
